image:image.image:caption: Dr. David Bennett, DVM listening to Gracie, a long-haired tabby cat, with a stethoscope during an in-home wellness exam in a kitchen in the East Bay, California, while Gracie's owner gently steadies her on the counter
image:image.image:title: House-Call Veterinarian & In-Home Pet Euthanasia in the East Bay | Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:caption: A dog and a cat looking together toward a rainbow bridge in a sunlit sky, symbolizing peace at end of life
image:image.image:title: In-Home Pet Euthanasia in the East Bay, CA | Compassionate End-of-Life Care | Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:title: In-Home Pet Euthanasia in the Berkeley Hills, CA | Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:title: In-Home Pet Euthanasia in Pleasant Hill, CA | Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:caption: A pet owner relaxes at home on a wooden porch with his two beloved border collie–style dogs — at Bennett Veterinary Service, we treat every pet as a family member, with in-home veterinary care throughout the East Bay
image:image.image:title: Contact Bennett Veterinary Service | House-Call Veterinarian East Bay, CA
